purpose: Mechanicus brain node that opens operator cockpit context.
truth_rules: CONNECTED may appear only with available Mechanicus root and tool index.
If status source is unreadable, unit must render UNKNOWN.
accessibility_rules: State must be readable by label and icon, not only color.
proof_requirements: State mapping proof between /api/state and node class.
Panel-open behavior proof for Mechanicus-only live panel.
change_safety: This node may change style without altering allowlist command policy.
